scripts.demo: npm run allure:clean && PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never npx playwright test; npm run allure:prepare && npx allure serve allure-results
scripts.demo:smoke: npm run allure:clean && PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never npx playwright test --grep @smoke; npm run allure:prepare && npx allure serve allure-results
scripts.demo:e2e: npm run allure:clean && PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never npx playwright test --grep @e2e; npm run allure:prepare && npx allure serve allure-results
scripts.demo:security: npm run allure:clean && PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never npx playwright test --grep @security; npm run allure:prepare && npx allure serve allure-results
scripts.demo:performance: npm run allure:clean && PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never npx playwright test --grep @performance; npm run allure:prepare && npx allure serve allure-results
scripts.demo:accessibility: npm run allure:clean && PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never npx playwright test --grep @accessibility; npm run allure:prepare && npx allure serve allure-results
scripts.demo:visual: npm run allure:clean && PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never npx playwright test --grep @visual; npm run allure:prepare && npx allure serve allure-results
scripts.allure:clean: mkdir -p allure-history && cp -r allure-report/history/* allure-history/ 2>/dev/null; rm -rf allure-results allure-report; true
scripts.allure:prepare: mkdir -p allure-results/history && cp -r allure-history/* allure-results/history/ 2>/dev/null; cp categories.json allure-results/; true
scripts.test:chromium: npm run allure:clean && npx playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.demo:regression: npm run allure:clean && PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never npx playwright test --grep @regression; npm run allure:prepare && npx allure serve allure-results
